overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077) along a canal waterfront. The camera moves from a dark covered walkway beneath an elevated structure into bright morning sunlight, passing various NPC pedestrians and neon-lit skyscrapers with reflective wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the canal pathway under the shadow of the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: standing by the railing looking out over the canal water

entered.detail: tall cylindrical skyscraper covered in red neon signage and digital displays
large illuminated advertisement screens on the skyscrapers showing corporate logos
wide concrete canal with still water reflecting the surrounding buildings
bright orange safety barrier running along the edge of the canal
dark metal overpass structure casting shadows over the walkway
illuminated orange seating along the left wall with people resting

segments.scene_description: Walking under a dark elevated highway structure along a futuristic canal. Neon-lit skyscrapers tower in the distance while orange benches line the left side. The area is sheltered with mixed artificial neon and dim natural lighting, and the wet pavement reflects the ambient light.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from covered walkway to open sunlit promenade

events.description: exiting the shadow of the overpass into direct morning sunlight, causing the wet pavement to become highly reflective

agents.ego_description: walking through increasing crowds of pedestrians as the environment brightens

notable_agents.action: leaning over the orange railing looking down at the canal water
sitting on bench reading a newspaper

entered.detail: concrete stairs with red trim leading up to the elevated structure
large spiky plants in planters lining the seating area

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the dark covered area into brighter light. The outdoor staircase becomes visible on the left while more pedestrians appear. The wet pavement begins to reflect the brightening sky and neon signs more vividly as direct sunlight hits the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit waterfront promenade with distant pedestrian bridge

agents.ego_description: walking through a busy promenade with many pedestrians in bright sunlight, passing by various street vendors

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera wearing a distinctive red hairstyle and casual clothing
standing near gray shipping containers that serve as vendor stalls

entered.detail: orange-railed bridge crossing over the canal in the distance
gray industrial containers converted to street vendor stalls

segments.scene_description: Walking in bright direct sunlight along the open promenade. The wet ground creates strong reflections of the neon signs and blue sky. A pedestrian bridge with orange railings approaches in the distance, while various pedestrians walk in both directions past shipping container vendors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, sheltered underpass into the brilliant glare of a futuristic morning. It begins beneath a dark elevated highway along a canal, where orange benches line the path and towering neon skyscrapers loom in the distance through a mix of artificial and dim natural light. As the camera moves forward, the scene transitions from the shadows into brightening light, revealing an outdoor staircase and more pedestrians while the wet pavement begins to vividly reflect the sky. The environment then opens fully into bright direct sunlight along a promenade, where the ground mirrors the blue sky and neon signs. Finally, the camera advances past shipping container vendors toward a pedestrian bridge with orange railings as people walk in both directions.
